_comment: Synthetic OneNote pages for Northbridge Health Network. ONN-002 is leadership-restricted to mirror commercial discussion notes; ONN-001 is shared staff context.

onenote_pages.title: Westgate Rollout - Risks and Dependencies
onenote_pages.author: PPL-001
onenote_pages.summary: Working notes after the 10-JUN quality meeting listing open readiness dependencies for Westgate go-live.
onenote_pages.content_excerpt: Open dependencies: CAPA-001 policy finalization, CAPA-004 environment documentation package, and final migration validation sign-off before vendor go-live confirmation.

onenote_pages.title: Lumina Commercial Escalation Prep
onenote_pages.author: PPL-002
onenote_pages.summary: Leadership prep notes for potential service-credit enforcement if vendor-side delays continue.
onenote_pages.content_excerpt: Prepare talking points on MSA clause 7.4 and decision threshold for invoking commercial remedies if milestone recovery misses the 22-JUN target.
